title: 'Workflows' integrations
excerpt: Hey there. My team uses MailChimp and outlook integrations. We also use the new ‘workflows’ feature for a bunch of stuff. Would be helpful to use some of the integration stuff from MC and outlook in our big workflow maps…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there. My team uses MailChimp and outlook integrations. We also use the new ‘workflows’ feature for a bunch of stuff. Would be helpful to use some of the integration stuff from MC and outlook in our big workflow maps. Anyone else working through something like this?

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Liam!

Sounds like you’re working on a complex setup. I’ve helped teams integrate Mailchimp and Outlook within Make workflows, connecting these tools seamlessly with other apps in big-picture workflow maps. Here’s an idea for how we could approach this:

Mailchimp-Outlook Sync Set up Make to streamline contact and campaign data between Mailchimp and Outlook, ensuring email campaigns and contacts are always in sync.

Workflow Trigger & Automation Connect Make to trigger specific Mailchimp actions or Outlook emails based on events in your workflows, enhancing your process automation.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Let’s Schedule the call and discuss this in more detail. I look forward to talking to you and your team should they join us.

We can help you with your integrations, implementations, support, improvement, training, and services and you can also learn along the way!
